title: Pungent Uruguayan Manchego One-pot
description: A hearty, aerated one-pot dish from Uruguay featuring Manchego cheese, suitable for Whole30 diet. This recipe combines beef, onions, and potatoes in a flavorful broth.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add potatoes, chicken broth, and Worcestershire sauce. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in Manchego cheese until melted and the soup is heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for later use.
Reheat to an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C) before serving.
Note: If using frozen Manchego cheese, thaw first according to package instructions before shredding and adding to the recipe.
